properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I wrote a letter to my Lord, I didn't know where to start; There was so much to thank Him for that swelled within my heart, I thanked Him for the love inside That I didn't have before; And at the end I signed it, "I'll be Yours forever more."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I wanna be Yours forever, Yours forever, Lord, I wanna be Yours forever, Yours forever, Yours forever, Yours forevermore.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A few days later in Sunday school We learned John 3:16, It told of Everlasting Life, if only we'd believe; Now everlasting means forever, And I begin to see God's word is a letter to my heart, He's written back to me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh Lord, I wanna be Yours O Lord, forevermore.
